description: Clone Chordinator repo, fetch ChordPro songs from GitHub, then run docker compose. Requires Docker already installed (run Chordinator-InstallDocker first).

ChordProMaxSongs.description: Max number of ChordPro songs to fetch (e.g. 80)

runCommand: echo Fetching ChordPro songs from {{ ChordProRepo }} (max {{ ChordProMaxSongs }})...

docker run --rm -v /home/ec2-user/the-chordinator:/app -w /app node:20-alpine node scripts/fetch-chordpro-from-github.mjs '{{ ChordProRepo }}' '{{ ChordProMaxSongs }}' || echo 'ChordPro fetch failed or skipped; continuing with build.'
echo No fetch script found; skipping ChordPro fetch.
echo Deploy complete. App should be on port 8080.
